description: A huge upgrade for our network when we switched to Rank Math from Yoast. They are always innovating and keeping their software at the forefront of modern SEO and GEO
author: David V.
pros: Rank Math is a superior SEO plugin on multiple levels. Even their free version empowers you to control a wide range of SEO for your WordPress site. Their local SEO settings are especially powerful and helpful for service based businesses.
cons: We've had several issues where the pro version of the plugin has had conflicts specifically with the Elementor builder. The custom schema types also are not user friendly - the UI for setting these up and testing markup could be improved upon. We typically end up adding custom schema via Elementor custom code modules.

description: Rank Math is a complete SEO solution for any WordPress powered website. Is has all the necessary tools for on page optimization, JSON schema and sitemap generator.
author: Kalvin R.
pros: The most important feature on Rank Math is the content optimization tools. It helps me on optimizing every page and blog article for a good SEO content. The guides that are given are easy to understand and follow, showing what is already done and what needs to be done. The AI help is another good touch from the developers as it saved a lot of time when i got stuck. Other great feature that I use and really helps me is the keyword tracking, is shows me a lot of details on the keywords, rank, visits and many more.
cons: Rank Math is great, i cannot think of any feature I can like less. Is always up to date with the latest SEO trends.

review_title: Rank Math Breaks on WP Engine and Hacks Site
description: Started great but as of late it's very poor. We are shocked at how unprofessional they've made things. They only care about corporate accounts. Go with SEO Press or Yoast if you want a decent and honest plugin developer.
author: Jeremy P.
pros: Free Rank Math is okay, there's a lot of You Tube videos for help. Their plugin uses fewer resources.
cons: When they hacked our site for pointing out bugs in their plugin at WP Engine. Their support is a dangerous group of overseas hackers, be warned.

review_title: Rank Math - easy to get on top
description: Rank Math is a real SEO powerhouse for WordPress, it offers all the tools needed for on-page SEO. It is also lightweight so it won't increase the website loading speed.
author: Emily F.
pros: The most I like is that it offers you clear guides on how to make the content SEO optimized for each page and blog article. These are easy to follow and explained for everybody to understand. It also offers sitemap generator and JSONLD schema without having to install extra plugins. Another thing I really enjoy is that they integrated AI help in optimizing the content.
cons: Rank Math is a complete SEO plugin, nothing to like least here.

description: Rank Math is the SEO problem solving for every WordPress site. Is rich-feature and easy to use whether you are a beginner of and advanced user. It has the complete bundle for on-page SEO and keyword tracking in one place.
author: Carly P.
pros: I really like Rank Math because is a light weight plugin that add all SEO functionalities for my WordPress setup without affecting page speed. As i used a different plugins xml sitemap, JSON schema and redirect, Rank Math offers all these functionalities in one place. It is intuitive and guides offered for page optimization are clear and easy to follow.
cons: There are no things I can say I like less, all the needed functions are working perfect.

review_title: Rank Math go high in ranks
description: Rank Math is a comprehensive SEO power tool for WordPress. Is easy to setup and use, it offers many useful features at a low price.
author: Peter G.
pros: I find the best feature the stepts Rank Math gives for page optimization. These steps are easy to follow and understand and gives a huge boost for the search engines. The AI help is another feature that needs to be mentioned, it helps you a lot with the content creation and optimization.
cons: There are no things to like less, Rank Math is an great tool.

description: Rank Math is a complete SEO solution for WordPress websites, is has some powerful features that that let you follow and increase website rankings with ease. It has integrated XML sitemaps and JSON schema witch let you uninstall 2 other plugins that handles these. Is light weight or well coded because I didn't saw any slowdown on the website after install and setup this plugin.
author: Robert G.
pros: The fact that help you on optimizing each page and article for a better search engine exposure is the most important feature for me. The guides to increase SEO score for each page are very clear and easy to follow. It was very easy to connect Rank Math to Analytics and track the keywords and their ranking withing WordPress dashboard.
cons: There are no things to like less at Rank Math.

description: Avoid if you want to get charged renewals without notification. I used the AI content pack and realised I have just been charged the renewal fee of $86.26. As I have never even used the service, I reached out to support to get my money back. The reply was that a reminder email was sent 7 days prior and as I had not cancelled the subscription, no refunds will be issued. I have searched my email including trash and spam, there is no reminder email. This is shady behaviour and as a result, RankMath should be avoided at all costs. Why would you be forced to pay for a service you have no used or will not use? Disgusting behaviour.
author: Byron B.
pros: Its a decent SEO plugin, decent options to boost SEO performance.
cons: They use shady practices to force renewals and then provide no options to get your funds back.

review_title: A Disappointing and Counterproductive SEO Tool
description: My experience with Rank Math's Content AI Creator has been overwhelmingly negative. While Rank Math itself is a separate SEO plugin, their AI add-on product falls significantly short of expectations, producing repetitive, poorly-formed titles and meta descriptions that could potentially harm your website's SEO rankings. The AI's output is consistently subpar, forcing users to waste credits attempting to generate even marginally acceptable results - time that would be better spent writing these elements manually. In my assessment, this appears to be a hastily developed product launched merely to capitalize on the AI trend, offering little value while potentially damaging users' SEO efforts. I cannot recommend this add-on tool, as it creates more problems than it solves for website optimization.
author: Sean C.
pros: Somewhat easy to install, except for all the inane questions and poor information
cons: AI is pointless and ineffectual. AI is repetitive AI Poorly designed and gives childish titles and meta descriptions

description: Rank Math is the most comprehensive SEO plugin for WordPress. It can be used for a simple blog, news website or WooCommerce shop. It offers all the features needed for a good on page SEO management, keyword tracking, sitemap generation and JSON schema.
author: Lucie E.
pros: The page optimization feature is the most important as it offers personalized optimization steps for each page and product. Other thing to mention that the plugin is lightweight and it doesn't affect the website loading speed. Setting up the plugin is straightforward and the setup wizard ease the job.
cons: I can't say there is something to like less.

review_title: Still one of the Best Wordpress SEO Plugins
description: Overall Rank math is one of the best SEO plugins for WordPress users. It has all the features you need and a decent UI that is easy to navigate.
author: Angus A.
pros: Decent UI and price point. Feature rich and support is very responsive.
cons: There are other options on the market that do the same thing and cost less or aren't subscription based.

description: I consider Rank Math the best plugin for Wordpress when it comes to SEO. Is lightweight and easy to setup and use. The AI integration is a big plus and really helps with titles and descriptions on each page.
author: Dean H.
pros: The most I like about Rank Math is that it has many features already integrated, you can easily manage the website's sitemap, JSON schema and keyword tracking with just this plugin. Page optimization is well documented and the guides for each page are straightforward and easy to implement.
cons: No cons for Rank Math, everything works great.

description: Overall I consider Rank Math a must have plugins for any WordPress website. The price is very good and its integrate may tools that are payd on other SEO plugins.
author: Albert V.
pros: Rank Math is the ultimate SEO plugin for Wordpress. It helps you to do On Page SEO from 0 to hero. AI tools offers you ideeas good points for the content. Another important feature is the keyword and rank tracker, you can save some loosing another third party app for your keywords.
cons: AI tools are available only with credits.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Rank Math is a fairly new extension for WordPress that has shaken up the market and pushed competitors to innovate. A welcome addition to the landscape of SEO extensions for WordPress. I've been using it on a daily basis on many sites for more than 2 years and I'm very satisfied with it
cons: It is normal, they have a business to support, but the extension pushes more and more towards the paid version, even when you only need the free features. The paid version is fine though, I also use it on some sites where it is necessary.

author: Piotr C.
pros: This plugin is all SEO features in one tool. The best features are 404 monitoring, redirections, and instant indexing. Rank Math has all premium features from Yoast for free
cons: I don't like this installing tutorial at start.

description: I used for more than 2 years RankMath to boost my website for SEO. I create content with AI thanks to the RankMath.
author: Anil C.
pros: I used RankMath for my wordpress website to boost and create AI content to have well designed blog strategy.
cons: RankMath has not have any bad feature, it gives you important perspective about your SEO strategy.

review_title: Makes VA Work for Blogs Easy
description: It's really easy to use!
author: Daisy T.
pros: I use this software plugged into a wordpress website and I really like it. It makes it easy to optimize blog posts and pages for my client. It's pretty much just a checklist of everything you need to include for SEO.
cons: I don't have any complaints but I guess I haven't really tried using any other software like this before.

description: Sto provando RankMath su alcuni siti di miei clienti, come alternativa a Yoast SEO, per ora l'esperienza è positiva. Trovo che sia diverso e più approfondito di Yoast Seo per certi aspetti, ma alla fine ottengo buoni risultati da entrambi.
author: Anna D.
pros: Trovo che Rank Math sia molto preciso e attendibile nei suggerimenti per l'ottimizzazione SEO, infatti seguendo le indicazioni riesco facilmente ad ottenere dei punteggi di ottimizzazione buoni
cons: Dall'altro lato dal punto di vista dei dettagli da poter editare e gestire, va molto in profondità e spesso trovo che sia complesso da seguire e da configurare.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: From my point of view Rank Math is a complete On Page SEO solution for WordPress. Is compatible with all the page builder and themes available for WordPress and is lightweight, did not saw any loading speed increase after install and setting up the plugin.
author: Adrian W.
pros: I consider a neat feature that Rank Math helps with SEO optimization on each page or blog article. The objectives that it offers are clear and easy to follow even if you are not a SEO expert. It also help track the rankings of specific keywords you choose displaying gain or loss in rankings. It also comes with support for WooCommerce and schema support without any other addons. Another feature I use and like is the AI integration witch helps with content creation and optimization.
cons: I cannot say that are things I like less on Rank Math.

review_title: Probably Good software if it worked
description: Horrible. Support is terrible. Just hope you don't have any installation problems.
author: Brian D.
pros: Probably good program if you could get it to work.
cons: The support is horrible. Just hope you don't have an issue because a real person will not contact you for days and when they do they will just send generic links on how to fix generic problems.

review_title: Rank Math - math for higher results
description: Rank Math is one of the best WordPress plugins when it comes to SEO management. It has all the needed features for a website, from keyword tracking to on page SEO management.
author: Jordan K.
pros: A comprehensive plugin for WordPress when it comes to SEO. It has many good and useful features like keyword rank tracker, SEO analysis for pages and entire website. The SEO page and articles suggestions are a neat features that helps optimizing a page or articles to get the best results on search. The recently added AI features are worth mentioning too, gives a hand with content optimization for best results.
cons: There are no things I can mention to like less.

description: Rank Math is a complete SEO solution for any WordPress setup. Is lightweight and doesn't slow down the website. It offers powerful a schema generator and WooCommerce support without any extra addons. Is easy to setup and offers comprehensive guides on how to optimize every page maximum rankings.
author: Silviu L.
pros: I really like this plugin because it offers the complete SEO pack for any WordPress website. Keyword tracking is a good features that tracks your websites keywords ranks and how they grow or decrease in rank. AI tools that they recently added are a major tool for my work, they help on creating the content that rank.
cons: There are no things to like less on Rank Math, everything is a helpful hand.

description: After using Yoast for many years this has been a big step up in terms of website performance.
author: Andy C.
pros: It doesn’t slow the website down as much as Yoast without losing performance.
cons: Certain elements of the UI could be better presented in line with competitors.

description: Good, but the support and refund policy are bad.
author: Adrian D.
pros: It's easy to use tool. Rank Math offers fast implementation.
cons: No refund policy. My subscription was renewed automatically, but the day after, I wanted a refund because I did not want to renew my subscription. Support told me that it's not possible. The problem is that I don't want to use their product anymore, but there is still no refund. In my opinion, it's not a fair policy.

description: I find Rank Math to be the most advanced and complete SEO plugin for WordPress. Is lightweight and has all features for a good SEO management for every website.
author: Lee W.
pros: What I liked for the first time when I found Rank Math it was that is light weight and does not increase website loading speed at all. It has Schema Markup already integrated and does not need any other expensive addon. Keyword tracker is another important feature I use. Optimizing every page SEO with Rank Math is fast and very easy with their AI help.
cons: There are nothing to mention in this section.
